title: Apocryphon of John: The Secret Teaching
source: Nag Hammadi Codex II; Berlin Codex
description: The most important Gnostic text: how the supreme God produced emanations, how Sophia's error created the flawed material world.
introduction: The most important Gnostic text: how the supreme God produced emanations, how Sophia's error created the flawed material world.

translation.text: The Monad is a monarchy with nothing above it. It is he who exists as God and Father of everything.
And Sophia of the Epinoia, being an aeon, conceived a thought from herself — she wanted to bring forth a likeness out of herself without the consent of the Spirit.
